seo.title: Kettlebell Academy | BODi
seo.description: Kettlebell Academy is a series divided into three training blocks, each with three distinct workouts, setting you up to successfully and safely train with a Kettlebell.

trainers.bioBodi: Amoila is an NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape—and his live strength, HIIT, and core workouts can do the same for you. In addition to his classes on BODi, Amoila is the creator of 645™, 6 Weeks of THE WORK®, and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™, available on Beachbody On Demand.

data.descriptionShort: Master the basics and take your fitness to the next level.
data.descriptionLong: Master the fundamentals of kettlebell training with elite athlete Amoila Cesar. Three training blocks safely build up your skills until you can perform advanced exercises with confidence.

131Ysx6vGIxsPsdQVteIOP.title: Kettlebell Snatches: Drills
131Ysx6vGIxsPsdQVteIOP.descriptionLong: This EMOM (every minute on the minute) workout will put your body to the test and leave you breathless. Be sure to choose an appropriate weight!

trainers.bio: Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.

cexXmUzqqOjSkM5iAZ4sMO.descriptionLong: Learn the foundational movements that build you up to a kettlebell swing. Practice the hinge utilizing the glutes to the wall method before testing your timing and coordination with air swings.
